children.name: ParseInput
children.purpose: Extract and validate action, repo, branch from input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON and return the action, repo, branch, and any additional parameters
guarantees: returns error if required fields missing

outputs.name: parsed_data
outputs.description: Object with action, repo, branch, and optional params

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid JSON with action, repo, branch, returns parsed_data with those fields
Given invalid JSON, returns error

children.name: RouteAction
children.purpose: Determine which build operation to perform based on action
children.behavior: Inspect the action field and return a decision string (trigger, status, list, cancel)
preconditions: parsed_data.action is one of trigger, status, list, cancel

outputs.name: decision
outputs.description: String indicating which child to invoke: trigger, status, list, cancel

acceptance_criteria.description: Given action 'trigger', returns 'trigger'
Given action 'status', returns 'status'
Given action 'list', returns 'list'
Given action 'cancel', returns 'cancel'
Given unknown action, returns error

children.name: CheckDuplicateBuild
children.purpose: Verify no existing build for the same repo+branch
children.behavior: Query builds data store for existing build with same repo and branch; return boolean

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query builds data store to check for existing build with same repo and branch

outputs.name: is_duplicate
outputs.description: True if build already exists for repo+branch

children.signature: def CheckDuplicateBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read builds data store to check for duplicates

data_operations.description: Query builds data store to check for existing build with same repo and branch

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch with existing build, returns true
Given repo and branch without existing build, returns false

children.name: CreateBuildRecord
children.purpose: Create a new build record in builds data store
children.behavior: Insert a new build entry with initial status, repo, branch, and generate build_id
postconditions: new build record exists in builds data store

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Insert new build record into builds data store

outputs.name: build_id
outputs.description: Unique identifier for the new build

children.signature: def CreateBuildRecord(repo: str, branch: str) -> str

global_vars.description: Write new build record to builds data store

data_operations.description: Insert new build record into builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given repo and branch, creates new build record and returns build_id
build_id is unique across all builds

children.name: ExecuteBuildPipeline
children.purpose: Run the actual CI/CD pipeline for the build
children.behavior: Invoke external build process (e.g., run tests, compile) and update build status incrementally
postconditions: build status updated to success or failure

call_inputs.name: build_id
call_inputs.description: ID of the build to execute

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Update build status incrementally during execution
Store build artifacts produced by the pipeline

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: Final status and logs of the build

children.signature: def ExecuteBuildPipeline(build_id: str, repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Update build status incrementally during execution
Store build artifacts produced by the pipeline

data_operations.description: Update build status incrementally during execution
Store build artifacts produced by the pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid build_id, repo, branch, executes build and returns result with final status and logs
Build status is updated incrementally during execution

children.name: QueryBuildStatus
children.purpose: Retrieve current status of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id in builds data store and return its status and logs
preconditions: build_id exists in builds data store

call_inputs.name: build_id
call_inputs.description: ID of the build to check

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Read build record to retrieve status and logs

global_vars.description: Read build record to retrieve status and logs

data_operations.description: Read build record to retrieve status and logs

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid build_id, returns status and logs
Given invalid build_id, returns error

children.name: ListAllBuilds
children.purpose: Return a list of all builds with their details
children.behavior: Query builds data store for all records and return array of build summaries

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Read all build records to return list

outputs.name: builds_list
outputs.description: Array of build objects with id, repo, branch, status

global_vars.description: Read all build records to return list

data_operations.description: Read all build records to return list

constraints.description: Must not modify builds data store

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of all builds with id, repo, branch, status

children.name: CancelBuildRecord
children.purpose: Mark a build as cancelled and stop execution if running
children.behavior: Update build status to cancelled in builds data store and signal termination of running pipeline
preconditions: build exists and is not already cancelled

call_inputs.name: build_id
call_inputs.description: ID of the build to cancel

constraints.description: Must signal termination of running pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid build_id, updates status to cancelled and returns success
Given already cancelled build, returns appropriate error

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Construct the final output JSON with success, build_id, status, logs
children.behavior: Aggregate results from the executed child into a standardized JSON response

call_inputs.name: action_result
call_inputs.description: Result from the executed child (build_result, status_info, builds_list, cancel_result, or error)

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Final JSON with success, build_id, status, logs

children.signature: def FormatResponse(action_result: dict, action: str) -> dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Given action_result and action, returns JSON with success, build_id, status, logs
Response structure is consistent across all actions

governance_notes: All children with internal_leaf_accesses have corresponding global_vars and data_operations entries. Pure functions (ParseInput, RouteAction, FormatResponse) have no data store access and thus empty arrays. The resource audit confirms synchronization between internal_leaf_accesses, global_vars, and data_operations for all children.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: No signatures were changed. All signatures match the Stage 2 interfaces exactly.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses maps directly to its data_operations and global_vars. For example, CheckDuplicateBuild has builds.read in all three fields. ExecuteBuildPipeline has builds.write and artifacts.write in all three fields.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For every child with non-empty internal_leaf_accesses, the global_vars and data_operations arrays contain identical entries. Pure functions have empty arrays in all three fields.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All data store accesses (builds.read, builds.write, artifacts.write) are covered by at least one child. No data store is accessed without being declared in internal_leaf_accesses.
